findings.text: NVIDIA currently dominates the gaming GPU market, holding approximately 95% of market share while AMD's share falls to about 5%.
NVIDIA's market share surged to an historic 92%, squeezing AMD down to an all‑time low of 8%.
The gap between NVIDIA and AMD in the GPU market is not narrowing; instead, it is expanding.

inferences: NVIDIA remains the dominant GPU supplier while AMD's market position is shrinking.
